zh.lifeSummary: 當Margaret Savile於1410年出生在英國時，她的父親Sir Thomas Savile29歲，母親Margaret Pilkington27歲。她於大約1427年2月26日與John Hopton結婚。他們至少是5個兒子和3個女兒的父母。她去世於1451年在她的家鄉享年41歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭素福爾可布萊斯賀包霍利 特利尼迪 亞德。

nameMeanings.name: Savile
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016

variants.name: Saville
meanings: English (of Norman origin; Yorkshire): habitational name from a place in northern France of which the identity is not clear, though it is probably Sainville in Eure-et-Loire, so called from Old French saisne ‘Saxon’ + ville ‘settlement’. Compare Savel , Savell , and Savelle .

nameMeanings.name: Margaret
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: An extremely common given name from the Middle Ages onwards, derived via Old French Marguerite and Latin Margarita from Greek Margarītēs, from margaron ‘pearl’, a word ultimately of Hebrew origin. The name was always understood to mean ‘pearl’ throughout the Middle Ages. The first St Margaret was martyred at Antioch in Pisidia during the persecution instigated by the Emperor Diocletian in the early 4th century. However, there is some doubt about her name, as the same saint is venerated in the Orthodox Church as Marina . There were several other saintly bearers of the name, including St Margaret of Scotland ( d. 1093 ), wife of King Malcolm Canmore and daughter of Edmund Ironside of England. It was also the name of the wife of Henry VI of England, Margaret of Anjou ( 1430–82 ), and of Margaret Tudor ( 1489–1541 ), sister of Henry VIII , who married James IV of Scotland and ruled as regent there after his death. See also Margery , Marjorie .

variants.name: Margareta
meanings: From the Latin form of Greek Margarītēs. See Margaret .

variants.name: Margaretta
meanings: An extremely common given name from the Middle Ages onwards, derived via Old French Marguerite and Latin Margarita from Greek Margarītēs, from margaron ‘pearl’, a word ultimately of Hebrew origin. The name was always understood to mean ‘pearl’ throughout the Middle Ages. The first St Margaret was martyred at Antioch in Pisidia during the persecution instigated by the Emperor Diocletian in the early 4th century. However, there is some doubt about her name, as the same saint is venerated in the Orthodox Church as Marina . There were several other saintly bearers of the name, including St Margaret of Scotland ( d. 1093 ), wife of King Malcolm Canmore and daughter of Edmund Ironside of England. It was also the name of the wife of Henry VI of England, Margaret of Anjou ( 1430–82 ), and of Margaret Tudor ( 1489–1541 ), sister of Henry VIII , who married James IV of Scotland and ruled as regent there after his death. See also Margery , Marjorie .

en.lifeSummary: When Margaret Savile was born in 1410, in England, her father, Sir Thomas Savile, was 29 and her mother, Margaret Pilkington, was 27. She married John Hopton about 26 February 1427. They were the parents of at least 5 sons and 3 daughters. She died in 1451, in her hometown, at the age of 41, and was buried in Holy Trinity Churchyard, Blythburgh, Suffolk, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Margaret Savile est née en 1410, à Angleterre, son père, Sir Thomas Savile, avait 29 ans et sa mère, Margaret Pilkington, avait 27 ans. Elle a épousé John Hopton environ 26 février 1427. Ils ont eu au moins 5 fils et 3 filles. Elle est décédée en 1451, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 41 ans, et a été enterrée à Holy Trinity Churchyard, Blythburgh, Suffolk, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

ja.lifeSummary: Margaret Savileが1410年にイギリスで生まれた時，父Sir Thomas Savileは29歳，母Margaret Pilkingtonは27歳であった。約1427年2月26日にJohn Hoptonと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも5人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼女は1451年に故郷で41歳で死去し，イギリスイギリススフォルクブリスブルグホーリー トリニトイ チャーチヤルドにて埋葬された。

ko.Holy Trinity Churchyard, Blythburgh, Suf: 영국 잉글랜드 수폴크 블리스버그h 홀이 트리니티 c후르c히아어드
ko.lifeSummary: Margaret Savile(이)가 1410년 영국에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Sir Thomas Savile(은)는 29세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Margaret Pilkington(은)는 27세였다. 그녀는 대략 1427년 2월 26일 John Hopton(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 다섯 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1451년 그녀의 고향에서 41세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 수폴크 블리스버그h 홀이 트리니티 c후르c히아어드에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Margaret Savile nasceu em 1410, em Inglaterra, seu pai, Sir Thomas Savile, tinha 29 anos e sua mãe, Margaret Pilkington, tinha 27 anos. Ela casou-se com John Hopton aproximadamente 26 de fevereiro de 1427. Eles tiveram pelo menos 5 filhos e 3 filhas. Ela faleceu em 1451, em sua cidade natal, com 41 anos, e foi sepultada em Holy Trinity Churchyard, Blythburgh, Suffolk, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.Holy Trinity Churchyard, Blythburgh, Suf: холи тринити чурчярд, блитбург, суффолк, Англия, Великобритания
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Margaret Savile родилась в 1410 г. в местности Англия, её отцу по имени Sir Thomas Savile было 29 лет, а матери, которую звали Margaret Pilkington, 27. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени John Hopton около 26 февраля 1427 г. У них было по крайней мере 5 сыновей и 3 дочери. Она умерла в 1451 г. в её родном городе в возрасте 41 год и была похоронена в местности холи тринити чурчярд, блитбург, суффолк, Англия, Великобритания.
